question: The line chart shows annual profit from 2018 to 2022. Which of the following statements is best supported by the chart as presented?

options.B: Profit was the same in 2019 and 2022.
options.C: The chart cuts off the highest profit value, so the exact peak cannot be read.
options.D: Profit decreased in every year shown.

explanation: Bars for the highest years exceed the canvas and are clipped, making them look the same height; the true relationship cannot be inferred from the visual.
